lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

sources.label: Coriolis
sources.what: Exploration build planner — FSD range, fuel scoop and internal-slot fitting for this ship.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous (official)
sources.what: Frontier's official Krait Mk II ship page — manufacturer specs, feature overview, and the ship render used on this page.

sources.label: EDCD coriolis-data
sources.what: Hull mass, FSD class, optional-internal sizes and fuel-scoop limits used to validate the exploration fit.

sources.label: Inara — Krait Mk II
sources.what: Per-ship page: base stats, hull price and outfitting reference for the exploration build.

sources.label: Fandom wiki
sources.what: Krait Mk II hull profile, internal layout and role notes backing the dossier write-up.

sources.label: YouTube — Down to Earth Astronomy
sources.what: Krait Mk II overview covering jump range, internal capacity and how it handles as a long-range build.
